text.title: North Star vs OKR Confidence Calibration Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces. Validator script enforces required keys and forbidden patterns.

schema.code: { "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#", "$id": "https://faion.net/schemas/north-star-vs-okr-confidence-calibration.json", "title": "North Star vs OKR Confidence Calibration", "type": "object", "required": [ "report_id", "owner", "last_touched", "okrs", "nsm_target", "confidence_per_kr", "risks", "interventions" ], "properties": { "report_id": {}, "owner": {}, "last_touched": {}, "okrs": {}, "nsm_target": {}, "confidence_per_kr": {}, "risks": {}, "interventions": {} }, "additionalProperties": true }

example.note: Missing required fields; violates schema constraints for `north-star-vs-okr-confidence-calibration`. Validator rejects with explicit violation list.
